allow: PowerShell(if \($env:SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN\) { Write-Output "TOKEN: present \(len=$\($env:SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN.Length\)\)" } else { Write-Output "TOKEN: MISSING" })

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $files = @\('C:\\Project\\18_OffSpace_Self_Growth_Agent\\scripts\\teatime-daily-publish.ps1','C:\\Project\\18_OffSpace_Self_Growth_Agent\\scripts\\install-teatime-scheduler.ps1'\); foreach \($f in $files\) { Write-Host "=== Parsing: $f ==="; $tokens = $null; $errs = $null; $ast = [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\($f, [ref]$tokens, [ref]$errs\); if \($errs.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Host "FAIL — $\($errs.Count\) error\(s\):"; $errs | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  Line $\($_.Extent.StartLineNumber\): $\($_.Message\)" } } else { Write-Host "OK — no syntax errors" } })

PowerShell($f='C:\\Project\\18_OffSpace_Self_Growth_Agent\\scripts\\install-teatime-scheduler.ps1'; $bytes=[System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f\); if \($bytes.Length -ge 3 -and $bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\) { Write-Host "BOM already present" } else { $bom = [byte[]]\(0xEF,0xBB,0xBF\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($f, $bom + $bytes\); Write-Host "BOM added" }; $tokens=$null; $errs=$null; $ast=[System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\($f,[ref]$tokens,[ref]$errs\); if \($errs.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Host "OK — no syntax errors" } else { $errs | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Line $\($_.Extent.StartLineNumber\): $\($_.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($files = @\('C:\\Project\\18_OffSpace_Self_Growth_Agent\\scripts\\teatime-daily-publish.ps1','C:\\Project\\18_OffSpace_Self_Growth_Agent\\scripts\\install-teatime-scheduler.ps1'\); $allOk = $true; foreach \($f in $files\) { $tokens=$null; $errs=$null; $null=[System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\($f,[ref]$tokens,[ref]$errs\); if \($errs.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Host "[OK] $\($f | Split-Path -Leaf\)" } else { $allOk=$false; Write-Host "[FAIL] $\($f | Split-Path -Leaf\)"; $errs | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  Line $\($_.Extent.StartLineNumber\): $\($_.Message\)" } } }; Write-Host ""; if \($allOk\) { Write-Host "ALL GREEN — both scripts parse cleanly under Windows PowerShell 5.1" -ForegroundColor Green })

PowerShell(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/Project/18_OffSpace_Self_Growth_Agent/output/raw/teatime-raw-2026-05-02.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); [print\(f'{k}: {len\(v\)}'\) for k,v in d['categories'].items\(\)]; print\('date:', d['date']\)")

PowerShell(cd C:\\Project\\18_OffSpace_Self_Growth_Agent; $env:GEMINI_API_KEY = \(Get-Content .env | Where-Object { $_ -match "^GEMINI_API_KEY=" } | Select-Object -First 1\) -replace "^GEMINI_API_KEY=","" -replace '"',''; Write-Host "API key length: $\($env:GEMINI_API_KEY.Length\)")

PowerShell(cd C:\\Project\\18_OffSpace_Self_Growth_Agent; $env:GEMINI_API_KEY = \(Get-Content .env | Where-Object { $_ -match "^GEMINI_API_KEY=" } | Select-Object -First 1\) -replace "^GEMINI_API_KEY=","" -replace '"',''; python scripts/teatime-auto-generate.py output/raw/teatime-raw-2026-05-02.json --output C:/tmp/test-out.md 2>&1)

PowerShell(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/raw/teatime-gen-2026-05-02.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('topics:', len\(d.get\('topics',[]\)\)\); [print\(f'  {t[\\"category\\"]}: messages={len\(t[\\"messages\\"]\)}, refs={len\(t[\\"references\\"]\)}'\) for t in d.get\('topics',[]\)]" 2>&1)

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content C:\\tmp\\test-out.md -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host "=== 첫 3줄 ==="; $lines[0..2] | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ }; Write-Host "=== 마지막 3줄 ==="; $lines[-3..-1] | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ }; Write-Host "=== 카테고리 헤더 ==="; $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match "^## \\d\\." } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ })
